_comment: ATC response templates by airport type (towered/uncontrolled), ATC state and pilot intent. ICAO-VFR English (Doc 4444 Ch. 12 phrase templates, Annex 10 Vol II Sec 5.2 procedure words). Each entry defines: response (template text with {variable} placeholders), next_state (state-machine transition), requires_readback (whether the pilot reads the clearance back). _INVALID is the fallback when no matching intent is found for the current state. Variables are filled at runtime by atc_state_machine::build_vars() from XPlaneContext data. Keys are kept identical to the de/ bundle. ASCII-only -- the ImGui font + XPLMDebugString render UTF-8 special characters as '?'. Note: the word TAKE-OFF appears only in the take-off clearance (Doc 4444 7.9.3.3); departure/airborne phrasing is used elsewhere.

fallbacks._comment: Controller fallback lines for unintelligible input. Rendered by engine.cpp::build_unclear_response() with a prepended callsign + comma.

bzf_strict._comment: BZF-strict-mode corrective tower responses. In the EN profile bzf_strict is NOT active (atc_templates::lookup_bzf_strict() gates on atc_profile() == 'DE'); these keys are retained for schema parity only and are rendered in ICAO wording (Annex 10 Vol II 5.2.1.9.4: READ BACK / NEGATIVE I SAY AGAIN). The ICAO/SERA readback conformance decision for EN is Issue #42. ASCII-only.
bzf_strict.missing_qnh: {callsign}, read back in full with QNH.
bzf_strict.missing_runway: {callsign}, read back in full with runway number.
bzf_strict.missing_frequency: {callsign}, read back in full with frequency.
bzf_strict.missing_squawk: {callsign}, read back in full with squawk.
bzf_strict.missing_callsign: {callsign}, always read back with full call sign.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, join downwind runway {runway}, report mid downwind.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND_VRP.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, cleared to enter control zone via {entry_vrp}, runway {runway}, report downwind.

REQUEST_TAXI.response: {callsign}, {airport} {taxi_controller}, good day, {position_remark}information {atis_letter}, taxi to holding point runway {runway} via Alpha, QNH {qnh}.

REQUEST_TAXI_PARKING.response: {callsign}, {airport} {taxi_controller}, taxi to the GA apron via Alpha.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, runway {runway}, cleared for take-off, wind {wind}, report downwind.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, runway {runway}, cleared for take-off, wind {wind}, frequency change after departure approved.

RUNWAY_VACATED.response: {callsign}, roger, contact Ground on {ground_frequency}, good day.

RUNWAY_VACATED_TOWER_ONLY.response: {callsign}, roger, taxi to the GA apron via Alpha.

REQUEST_TAXI.response: {callsign}, taxi to holding point runway {runway} via Alpha, QNH {qnh}.

INITIAL_CALL_TOWER.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, runway {runway}, hold short of runway, number one.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, cleared for take-off, wind {wind}, report downwind.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, cleared for take-off, wind {wind}, frequency change after departure approved.

REQUEST_TAXI_TOWER_ONLY.response: {callsign}, taxi to holding point runway {runway} via Alpha, QNH {qnh}.

REQUEST_TOUCH_AND_GO.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, cleared touch and go, wind {wind}.

REPORT_POSITION_DOWNWIND.response: {callsign}, number one, runway {runway}, continue approach, report final.
{callsign}, number one, runway {runway}, continue approach, report final.

REQUEST_TOUCH_AND_GO.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, cleared touch and go, wind {wind}.

GO_AROUND.response: {callsign}, roger, fly runway heading, climb to pattern altitude, rejoin downwind runway {runway}.

REPORT_POSITION_DOWNWIND.response: {callsign}, number one, runway {runway}, continue approach, report final.

REQUEST_TOUCH_AND_GO.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, cleared touch and go, wind {wind}.

RUNWAY_VACATED_TOWER_ONLY.response: {callsign}, roger, taxi to the GA apron via Alpha.

GO_AROUND.response: {callsign}, roger, fly runway heading, rejoin downwind runway {runway}.

RUNWAY_VACATED_TOWER_ONLY.response: {callsign}, roger, taxi to the GA apron via Alpha.

REQUEST_TAXI_PARKING.response: {callsign}, runway vacated, taxi to the GA apron via Alpha, good day.

GO_AROUND.response: {callsign}, roger, fly runway heading, climb to pattern altitude, rejoin downwind runway {runway}.

number_to_land_follow._comment: Phase-4 sequencing overlay. Replaces the plain landing clearance when the pilot is not number one. Variables are set by landing_sequence::compute_landing_sequence(). ICAO Doc 4444 12.3.4.14(b): NUMBER ... FOLLOW (traffic type and position).
number_to_land_follow.response: {callsign}, number {seq_number}, follow the {seq_type} on {seq_position}, cleared to land runway {runway}.

continue_approach_traffic_runway._comment: Phase-4 sequencing overlay. Replaces the landing clearance when a stationary/taxiing target is on the active runway centerline. ICAO Doc 4444 12.3.4.15(d): CONTINUE APPROACH.
continue_approach_traffic_runway.response: {callsign}, continue approach, traffic on the runway.

TRAFFIC_DIALOG._comment: Phase-2 traffic dialog. Side channel parallel to the main ATCState flow -- entries here are rendered exclusively by traffic_dialog and atc_state_machine::render_traffic_advisory(). next_state values have no function (traffic_dialog holds its own state), kept only for schema compatibility.

taxi_give_way.response: {callsign}, give way to the {type} {side} of you.

go_around_traffic_runway._comment: Phase-4 unsolicited controller call. Fires when the user in Pattern/LANDING_CLEARED is within 1 NM of the threshold and a target is on the active runway. Pure render action: no ATCState change, no traffic_dialog ack expected.
go_around_traffic_runway.response: {callsign}, go around, traffic on the runway, climb runway heading 3000 feet.

_INVALID.response: {callsign}, report traffic in sight or negative contact.

RADIO_CHECK.response: No reply on the traffic frequency. Frequency appears active.

INFO._comment: AFIS/Info unit (EUROCONTROL AFIS Manual 2.4: information, no clearances, no readback). {station} = '<airport> Information'. 'at your discretion' is AFIS convention, not an ICAO clearance.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND.response: {callsign}, {station}, runway {runway} in use, QNH {qnh}, no reported traffic, report downwind.

INITIAL_CALL_GROUND.response: {callsign}, {station}, runway {runway} in use, QNH {qnh}, taxi at your discretion.

SELF_ANNOUNCE_DEPARTURE._comment: AFIS does not actively acknowledge departure self-announcements (information unit). Empty response -> silent transition.

INFO._comment_rmz: RMZ phrases modeled in the Info/advisory style (AFIS is advisory, no clearance, no readback). RMZ_ENTER stays IDLE (follow-up downwind/base/final advisory in this INFO block); RMZ_LEAVE -> EN_ROUTE (transit pilot continues cross-country).

RMZ_ENTER.response: {callsign}, {station}, runway {runway} in use, QNH {qnh}, no reported traffic, report downwind.

RADIO._comment: Radio unit with flight information officer: advisory like Info, {station} = '<airport> Radio'. No clearances, no readback.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND.response: {callsign}, {station}, runway {runway} in use, QNH {qnh}, report downwind.

INITIAL_CALL_GROUND.response: {callsign}, {station}, runway {runway} in use, QNH {qnh}, taxi at your discretion.

SELF_ANNOUNCE_DEPARTURE._comment: Advisory unit does not actively acknowledge departure self-announcements. Empty response -> silent transition.
